description: M11 - IFRS-17 Allocated Cash by Contract

miscTables.descr: ACD
pivot
Co
Incl_Excl
Co,GL
USD_Amt
G:H
P
Co,Contract,UWYR,BusCat,YearPeriod,Crcy,Amt1,Amt2,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,GL,PC,Flex5,Flex6
Co,Contract,UWYR,BusCat,YearPeriod,Crcy,Amount,USD_Amt,I/E,Cash,Grp1,Grp2,GL,PC,PortPC,Program
Co,Contract,UWYR,Flex3,Flex4
Update TransX set Crcy = 'RSD' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Crcy = 'CSD'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'C' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'D' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '10'
Update TransX set BusCat = 'A' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '2%'
Update TransX set BusCat = (case when substring(GL,1,2) in ('13') then 'A' else 'C' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (BusCat = '' or BusCat = 'XX')
Update TransX set Flex1 = 'I' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex2 = (case when TTY = '806' then 'yes' else 'no' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.Flex6 = y.Typ, x.Flex9 = y.Product, x.Hierarchy = y.Hierarchy from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex6 = Hierarchy where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex6,'') = ''

Update x set Flex5 = '7' + m1.field2 + m2.field2 + x.BusCat + 'N' + (case when x.TP like 'F%' then 'A' else 'T' end) + 'P0' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m1 on m1.Field1 = x.Co and m1.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m1.ID = 'PC' and m1.Descr = 'Co' inner join Misc_Tables m2 on m2.Field1 = x.Flex9 and m2.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m2.ID = 'PC' and m2.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Contract,UWYR,BusCat,YearPeriod,Crcy,Amt1,Amt2,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,GL,PC,Flex5,Flex6) (select KeyID, Co,Contract,UWYR,BusCat,YearPeriod,Crcy,round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2),round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2),Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,GL,PC,Flex5,Flex6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  group by KeyID, Co,Contract,UWYR,BusCat,YearPeriod,Crcy,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,GL,PC,Flex5,Flex6)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0
